title: NIM's Resin Equipment!
description: Introduces new Resin Equipments to the game! since Minecraft didn't make them...
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e23e2a8a4719c1c1db775fc526574a2116b8b373.png) - ## Nim’s Resin Equipment [1.21+] Adds **resin-based tools and armor** to Minecraft, creating a **new early-game progression tier** with a sticky twist! > ### **Features** - **Resin Clumps** → **Bricks** → **Tools/Armor** chain - Thematic advancements (**"Sticky Situation," "The Wand Whispers..."**) - Balanced stats: **Stronger than stone, weaker than iron** # > ### **The Creaking Wand** Craft this eerie wand with **2 Sticks + 1 Creaking Heart** to: - Summon a **Creaking Guard** (your decoy distraction). - Gain **Speed + Regeneration + Invisibility** to flee danger in style. _"When in doubt, creak your way out!"_ # **Download now** to make tree sap your greatest ally! **Supports:** Minecraft 1.21+ | Fabric/Forge/Quilt/Neoforge (or Datapack) [![Modrinth Profile](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d3e248c42131dce0f3d5a71b7b00052c1dd30f1.webp)](https://modrinth.com/user/rkfZlDX9) [![Discord Server](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe7c8236127166e8a42164313159059b30feb0f1.webp)](https://discord.gg/WhYhbGTZgd) - ![showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/73a7008b24013b49448ca19fff4025ec867ee50b.jpeg) ![showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f864db8966b4fbb8b152be175aff2b0a5dde224e.jpeg) ![showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/317ec6f41d07d4099213a100a3c1fdf3a5b21c23.jpeg) -

![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/524fb2c8666c9544ed14acdb9641241abe2d7c63.gif)
